CREATE TABLE users (
	id SERIAL NOT NULL, 
	email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, 
	full_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, 
	phone VARCHAR(20), 
	hashed_password TEXT NOT NULL, 
	is_active BOOLEAN, 
	is_verified BOOLEAN, 
	avatar_url TEXT, 
	created_by INTEGER, 
	created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, 
	updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, 
	PRIMARY KEY (id), 
	FOREIGN KEY(created_by) REFERENCES users (id)
)

CREATE TABLE users (
	id SERIAL NOT NULL, 
	email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, 
	full_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, 
	phone VARCHAR(20),

	avatar_url TEXT, 
	created_by INTEGER, 
	created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, 
	updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, 
	PRIMARY KEY (id), 
	FOREIGN KEY(created_by) REFERENCES users (id)
)

CREATE TABLE offers (
	id SERIAL NOT NULL, 
	title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, 
	description TEXT, 
	discount_type VARCHAR(50), 
	discount_value FLOAT NOT NULL, 
	code VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, 
	course_id INTEGER, 
	created_by_admin INTEGER, 
	distributor_id INTEGER, 
	max_redemptions INTEGER, 
	current_redemptions INTEGER, 
	is_active BOOLEAN, 
	valid_from TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, 
	valid_until TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, 
	created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, 
	PRIMARY KEY (id), 
	FOREIGN KEY(course_id) REFERENCES courses (id) ON DELETE SET NULL, 
	FOREIGN KEY(created_by_admin) REFERENCES users (id), 
	FOREIGN KEY(distributor_id) REFERENCES distributors (id) ON DELETE SET NULL
)

	id SERIAL NOT NULL, 
	attempt_id INTEGER NOT NULL, 
	user_id INTEGER NOT NULL, 
	exam_id INTEGER NOT NULL, 
	total_questions INTEGER, 
	correct_answers INTEGER,

2026-03-22 13:25:38,091 INFO sqlalchemy.engine.Engine 
CREATE TABLE users (
	id SERIAL NOT NULL, 
	email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, 
	full_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, 
	phone VARCHAR(20), 
	hashed_password TEXT NOT NULL, 
	is_active BOOLEAN,

CREATE TABLE exam_results (
	id SERIAL NOT NULL, 
	attempt_id INTEGER NOT NULL, 
	user_id INTEGER NOT NULL, 
	exam_id INTEGER NOT NULL, 
	total_questions INTEGER, 
	correct_answers INTEGER, 
	total_marks FLOAT, 
	obtained_marks FLOAT, 
	percentage FLOAT, 
	passed BOOLEAN, 
	evaluated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, 
	PRIMARY KEY (id), 
	UNIQUE (attempt_id), 
	FOREIGN KEY(attempt_id) REFERENCES exam_attempts (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, 
	FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, 
	FOREIGN KEY(exam_id) REFERENCES entrance_exams (id) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

2026-03-23 05:32:05,513 INFO sqlalchemy.engine.Engine 
CREATE TABLE users (
	id SERIAL NOT NULL, 
	email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, 
	full_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, 
	phone VARCHAR(20), 
	hashed_password TEXT NOT NULL, 
	is_active BOOLEAN, 
	is_verified BOOLEAN, 
	avatar_url TEXT, 
	created_by INTEGER, 
	created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, 
	updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, 
	PRIMARY KEY (id), 
	FOREIGN KEY(created_by) REFERENCES users (id)
)

	id SERIAL NOT NULL, 
	user_id INTEGER NOT NULL, 
	course_id INTEGER NOT NULL, 
	enrolled_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, 
	is_active BOOLEAN, 
	progress_percent FLOAT, 
	completed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, 
	discount_applied FLOAT, 
	price_paid FLOAT, 
	distributor_id INTEGER, 
	PRIMARY KEY (id), 
	FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, 
	FOREIGN KEY(course_id) REFERENCES courses (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, 
	FOREIGN KEY(distributor_id) REFERENCES distributors (id) ON DELETE SET NULL

CREATE TABLE offers (
	id SERIAL NOT NULL, 
	title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, 
	description TEXT, 
	discount_type VARCHAR(50), 
	discount_value FLOAT NOT NULL, 
	code VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, 
	course_id INTEGER, 
	created_by_admin INTEGER, 
	distributor_id INTEGER, 
	max_redemptions INTEGER, 
	current_redemptions INTEGER, 
	is_active BOOLEAN, 
	valid_from TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, 
	valid_until TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, 
	created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, 
	PRIMARY KEY (id), 
	FOREIGN KEY(course_id) REFERENCES courses (id) ON DELETE SET NULL, 
	FOREIGN KEY(created_by_admin) REFERENCES users (id), 
	FOREIGN KEY(distributor_id) REFERENCES distributors (id) ON DELETE SET NULL
)
